task: Diagnosed context-cut handover failures and fixed stop.py to auto-launch talk-only sessions without approval gate when context limit triggers mid-research
discussion_summary: User reported two critical bugs: (1) research sessions cut at 75% context were not generating proper handovers or autonomous continuations, and (2) a singular session that hit 75% context never triggered pre-compact hook or autonomous session with required instructions. Investigation revealed stop.py was firing correctly but direction_proposal was gating autonomous launch behind user approval. Fixed by removing approval gate for context-cut talk-only sessions, allowing immediate autonomous continuation with inferred direction.

accomplishments.what: Diagnosed root cause: direction_proposal notification was blocking auto-launch of context-cut research sessions
Modified stop.py line 196 to auto-launch talk-only sessions without approval when context trigger fires
Verified stop.py imports and syntax with Python test

next_actions.action: Test context-cut scenario end-to-end: trigger 75% context limit in a research session and verify autonomous talk-only session launches immediately with inferred direction in next_actions
next_actions.why: Fix was deployed but not yet validated against the original failure case

next_actions.action: Verify pre_compact.py hook fires BEFORE context compaction and that it prevents auto-compaction when direction_proposal is pending
next_actions.why: User reported pre-compact hook never fired in the failing session; need to confirm hook registration and timing

next_actions.action: Add integration test to askr test suite covering: research session → 75% context trigger → autonomous continuation with direction inference
next_actions.why: This scenario was not caught by existing tests; prevents regression

next_actions.action: Review daemon.log rotation and retention to ensure future context-cut events are fully logged for debugging
next_actions.why: Daemon log was truncated; need visibility into all lifecycle events for troubleshooting

decisions.decision: Auto-launch talk-only sessions on context-cut without user approval gate
decisions.reason: Context limit is a hard constraint; delaying autonomous continuation with approval prompt defeats the purpose of seamless handover

decisions.decision: Keep direction_proposal notification for user visibility but decouple it from launch gate
decisions.reason: User should see what direction was inferred, but should not block autonomous session start

failed_approaches.approach: Assumed direction_proposal was only for talk-only sessions without next_actions
failed_approaches.reason: Transcript showed direction_proposal was also gating context-cut research sessions, which should auto-launch

relational_files.why: Lifecycle orchestrates stop hook and context trigger logic
Pre-compact hook should fire before context compaction; needs verification it prevents auto-compaction
Extension handles direction_confirm and direction_proposal notifications

blockers: Need to reproduce context-cut scenario to validate fix works end-to-end
